series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications or correspondence related to burial permits. Applications may contain confidential information like social security numbers. Social security numbers are confidential pursuant to State ex rel Beacon Journal Publishing Co v. Kent State, 68 Ohio St. 3d 40, 43.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records maintained in paper form may be imaged and indexed to a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that the paper record is imaged and indexed properly, the paper record shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained on-site for four years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then machine readable record shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microfiche, the records shall be maintained on-site for four years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then microfiche shall be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
